acceptance_criteria: Provider calls 0 and no undeleted cloud resources.
At least 14 of 16 candidates execute through a project-correct runner.
Certification decided by the official SWE-bench parser logic (vendored, byte-identical).
Accepted rows are certified-resolved with a recorded uncurated wrongness witness.
At least 5 accepted rows, else publish a null with the full outcome distribution.
No bar relaxed and no candidate re-labeled.
No natural-frequency, non-elicited, benchmark-size, detector, leaderboard, model-comparison, or SOTA claim.

evidence.notes: CI run 29339072961 (success) executed all 16 candidates project-correct under gold and variant; 32 logs retained.
16 official eval_scripts extracted via make_test_spec: 8 django_runtests, 8 pytest.
16/16 certified-resolved. 0 accepted: no shipped test (graded or 193 uncurated) distinguishes any variant from gold. django PASS_TO_PASS is the whole module.
Accepted set empty; null against the >=5 bar. Synthesized-input oracle re-scoped to iter195 with disclosure.

falsifiers: Any accepted row is not certified-resolved by the official parser logic.
Any accepted row lacks a reproducible wrongness witness.
Fewer than 14 candidates execute project-correct (runner fix failed).
A bar is relaxed or a candidate re-labeled to manufacture an accepted row.
The result presents a leaderboard, model-comparison, SOTA, natural-frequency, non-elicited, or benchmark-size claim.
stated_goal: Execute the iter193 candidates through a project-correct runner and decide certified-resolved and wrongness, re-testing the >=5 certified-resolved-and-wrong bar.
